title: Blasters for Hire

"'''Blasters for Hire'''" is an [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] source article written by [[Tony Russo|Anthony Russo]]. It was first published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]].  The article detailed the [[Red Moons]], a group of [[Mercenary/Legends|Mercenaries]]. 

{{Book-stub}}
